story.iWant: an auto-generated viewer that shows all slides in gallery and presentation modes
story.soThat: I can see all slides at a glance and present them sequentially

tasks.task: Create viewer template 1.1 Create .slide-builder/templates/viewer-template.html 1.2 Implement gallery mode with CSS grid and iframe thumbnails 1.3 Implement presentation mode with single slide view 1.4 Add navigation controls (prev/next/close buttons) 1.5 Add slide counter display 1.6 Style with theme colors (dark bg, lime accent)

Add viewer generation to build-one workflow 2.1 Update .slide-builder/workflows/build-one/instructions.md with viewer generation step 2.2 Implement slide discovery (scan for slide-*.html files) 2.3 Sort slides numerically 2.4 Generate index.html from template with slide list
Add viewer generation to build-all workflow 3.1 Update .slide-builder/workflows/build-all/instructions.md with viewer generation step 3.2 Generate viewer after all slides are built
Test and validate 4.1 Build 2+ slides and verify viewer shows all 4.2 Test gallery → presentation → gallery flow 4.3 Test navigation (prev/next/close) 4.4 Verify viewer regenerates on new slide build

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given slides exist in output/{deck-slug}/slides/, When I open output/{deck-slug}/index.html, Then I see a gallery grid of all slide thumbnails
And clicking a thumbnail enters presentation mode showing that slide
And prev/next buttons navigate between slides
And a close button returns to gallery view
And the viewer is auto-regenerated after each slide build

doc.title: Slide Builder - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Auto-generated viewer showing all slides in gallery and presentation modes. Gallery grid with thumbnails, click to present, prev/next navigation, auto-regeneration after builds.

doc.title: Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Viewer template with gallery + presentation modes. iframe thumbnails using transform: scale(0.208). Slide discovery scans for slide-*.html, sorts numerically. Auto-generation after each build.

doc.title: Story 8.1: Output Folder Architecture
doc.snippet: Output structure: output/{deck-slug}/slides/slide-N.html. Slug stored in status.yaml. plan.yaml copied to output folder. Single slides go to output/singles/.

file.reason: Reference implementation for gallery grid layout with iframe thumbnails using CSS transform scale(0.208)
Defines output path variables. Viewer generation step needs to be added to instructions.md
Slide save and status update logic. Viewer generation step should be added after Step 4 or in Step 5
Batch slide save and summary. Viewer generation should happen once at end in Step 5
Theme values for viewer styling: dark bg #0a0a0a, lime accent #d4e94c, Outfit font
Contains deck_slug and output_folder needed for viewer path resolution

ecosystem.name: node
ecosystem.package: Used for screenshot/PDF generation (not needed for viewer)
Used for Google Slides export (not needed for viewer)

dependencies.notes: No additional dependencies required. Viewer is pure HTML/CSS/JS.

constraints.constraint: Follow BMAD workflow pattern: workflow.yaml + instructions.md
Viewer must be self-contained HTML with no external dependencies except Google Fonts
Use iframe + CSS transform scale(0.208) for thumbnails (matches samples/index.html pattern)
Slides are 1920x1080px; thumbnails scale down proportionally
Theme colors: dark background #0a0a0a, lime accent #d4e94c, teal #4ecdc4
Viewer is read-only presentation layer - does not modify slide files

interface.name: Slide Discovery
interface.signature: discoverSlides(outputFolder) → string[] // Returns sorted slide-*.html filenames
interface.path: Logic to be added to build workflow instructions

interface.name: Viewer Template Placeholders
interface.signature: {{SLIDE_LIST}} - JSON array of slide info, {{DECK_NAME}} - title, {{TOTAL_SLIDES}} - count

interface.name: Status YAML Fields
interface.signature: deck_slug: string, output_folder: string (both set by story 8-1)

tests.standards: No automated test framework currently configured. Manual browser testing per Frontend Test Gate section in story file.

locations.location: Workflow execution via Claude Code skills (/sb:build-one, /sb:build-all)

ideas.idea: Open output/{deck-slug}/index.html and verify gallery grid displays all thumbnails
Click thumbnail, verify presentation mode shows correct slide
Click prev/next, verify navigation works at boundaries (first/last slide)
In presentation mode, click close button, verify returns to gallery
Run /sb:build-one, refresh browser, verify new slide appears in gallery
